title: Compilation error on macOS Monterey with M1 Mac
body:
```
../V3Hash.h:59:40: error: ambiguous conversion for functional-style cast from 'unsigned long' to 'V3Hash'
        return V3Hash(combine(m_value, V3Hash(that).m_value));
                                       ^~~~~~~~~~~
../V3Hash.h:63:74: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'V3Hash::operator+<unsigned long>' requested here
    template <class T> V3Hash& operator+=(T that) { return *this = *this + that; }
                                                                         ^
../V3Hasher.cpp:361:24: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'V3Hash::operator+=<unsigned long>' requested here
                m_hash += itr.first;
                       ^
../V3Hash.h:37:14: note: candidate constructor
    explicit V3Hash(uint32_t val)
             ^
../V3Hash.h:39:14: note: candidate constructor
    explicit V3Hash(int32_t val)
             ^
../V3Hash.h:41:14: note: candidate constructor
    explicit V3Hash(uint64_t val)
             ^
../V3Hash.h:43:14: note: candidate constructor
    explicit V3Hash(int64_t val)
```

The compiler is:
```
Configured with: --prefix=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr --with-gxx-include-dir=/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/include/c++/4.2.1
Apple clang version 13.0.0 (clang-1300.0.29.3)
Target: arm64-apple-darwin21.2.0
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin
```

I think this is due to uint64_t being defined as unsigned long long for this compiler but vluint64_t being defined as unsigned long.
